examples:
Command Example
!attivo-deploy-decoy vulnerable_ip=172.16.40.55
Human Readable Output
1 new Attivo decoy(s) deployed on the subnet with 172.16.40.55
5. Get events for an attacker IP address
Retrieves events for a specific source IP.
Base Command
attivo-get-events

!attivo-deploy-decoy vulnerable_ip=172.16.40.55
Human Readable Output
1 new Attivo decoy(s) deployed on the subnet with 172.16.40.55
5. Get events for an attacker IP address
Retrieves events for a specific source IP.
Base Command
attivo-get-events
Input
name: attivo-get-events

outputs.description: Total number of events retrieved Attivo.Events.List.AttackName Short name of the attack
outputs.name: Attivo.Events.Count

outputs.description: Kill chain phase of the attack Attivo.Events.List.Server Internal name of the target decoy
outputs.name: Attivo.Events.List.Attack Phase

outputs.description: Display name of the target decoy Attivo.Events.List.TargetOS Operating system of the target decoy
outputs.name: Attivo.Events.List.Target

outputs.description: Attacker IP address Attivo.Events.List.Service The attacked service
outputs.name: Attivo.Events.List.Attacker

outputs.description: Time of the attack Attivo.Events.List.TargetIP IP address of the target decoy
outputs.name: Attivo.Events.List.Timestamp
